sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 70:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 70:1
items.html: The last phase in all the degrees, meaning phase four in phase four, is called “the last of them,” since it is the coarsest, which is called “Sof” [end], and because all the degrees appear only in order to correct it
